name: Chicken Merengo
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken pieces with salt and pepper.
2. Roll the chicken in flour.
3. Heat butter and olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Add chicken to the skillet and brown on all sides.
5. Remove chicken from the skillet and place it in a single layer in a shallow baking dish.
6. Add garlic to the skillet and sauté until soft.
7. Stir flour into the pan drippings, add tomatoes (with juice) and wine, and stir briskly over medium-high heat until the sauce bubbles and thickens.
8. Add mushrooms.
9. Pour sauce over chicken.
10. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 40 to 45 minutes or until chicken is tender.
11. Serve sprinkled with finely chopped chives.
